blocks.body: Past Perfect: Negatives — had not / hadn't + V3 for actions that had not happened before another past action or before a past moment.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"In negative Past Perfect, we use had not + V3 or the short form hadn't + V3.","rules":[{"label":"had not / hadn't + V3","color":"emerald","text":"This is the basic negative model for all subjects.","example":"I had not finished. / She hadn't called."},{"label":"Not before then","color":"blue","text":"The negative shows that the action had not happened before another past event or moment.","example":"We hadn't eaten before the meeting started."},{"label":"Still not by that time","color":"amber","text":"It is often important to say that there was still no result by a certain past time.","example":"By 9 p.m., they hadn't arrived."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic negative formula","intro":"Remember the two common negative forms of Past Perfect.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"had not + V3","subtitle":"I had not seen that photo before."},{"label":"Short form","title":"hadn't + V3","subtitle":"She hadn't finished when I called."},{"label":"All subjects","title":"hadn't works with everyone","subtitle":"I hadn't / he hadn't / we hadn't"},{"label":"Meaning","title":"not earlier / not ready by then","subtitle":"The action had not happened before another event or before a past moment."}]}

{"title":"2. Where negatives are useful","sections":[{"label":"Not yet before another event","color":"emerald","description":"Show that the action had still not happened when another event happened in the past.","examples":[{"en":"I hadn't locked the door when we left.","ua":"The action was still incomplete then."},{"en":"She hadn't read the message when I asked her.","ua":"Reading had not happened yet at that moment."}]},{"label":"Not by a certain time","color":"blue","description":"Say that there was still no result by a specific past time.","examples":[{"en":"By midnight, they hadn't found a hotel.","ua":"There was still no result by midnight."},{"en":"He hadn't finished the report by Friday.","ua":"The task was not complete by that point."}]},{"label":"No earlier experience","color":"amber","description":"Negatives are often used when there was no experience before then.","examples":[{"en":"She hadn't flown before that trip.","ua":"There was no earlier experience."},{"en":"They hadn't worked together before.","ua":"They had no shared experience before then."}]},{"label":"Reasons and explanations","color":"violet","description":"The negative helps explain why something went wrong later in the past.","examples":[{"en":"We were late because we hadn't checked the address.","ua":"The missing earlier action explains the result."},{"en":"He was nervous because he hadn't prepared enough.","ua":"The reason is connected with what had not happened earlier."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Common patterns","intro":"See where not stands in Past Perfect.","rows":[{"en":"I had not finished the task before lunch.","ua":"had not finished","note":"full form"},{"en":"She hadn't called before the lesson started.","ua":"hadn't called","note":"short form"},{"en":"By that time, we hadn't seen the results.","ua":"hadn't seen","note":"not by then"},{"en":"They hadn't stayed there before.","ua":"hadn't stayed","note":"no earlier experience"}],"warning":"After hadn't, you still need V3, not V2."}

{"title":"4. Short summary","items":["Negative Past Perfect = had not + V3 or hadn't + V3.","The form hadn't is the same for all subjects.","These sentences show that an action had not happened before another past action or before a past time.","After hadn't, always use V3."]}
